'''''In the Political Pit''''' was a popular [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] [[Politics/Legends|political]] debate show which aired in the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|108|''In the Political Pit''}}</ref> It featured interviews with political figures. On [[22 BBY/Legends|13:4:11]], the show was broadcast on Feed CWN115 at 1935, featuring a panel consisting of [[RCLU]] Chairbeing [[Dotswa Ween]], [[Actor/Legends|actor]] [[Reridan Reksiss]], [[Junior Representative|Representative]] [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]], and a [[Musician/Legends|recording artist]] named [[Gaeriala Boosin]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
''In the Political Pit'' was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 51|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #51'']], an issue of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|feed]]<ref name="HNN" /> that was published on [[April 11]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN51 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6401165|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=MattPeriolat|date=2002-04-11|time=6:19 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> The section that referenced the show, entitled "What to Scan,"<ref name="HNN" /> was written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]].<ref name="HNN Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref>
